parsed_review.summary: CP00-653 is a Risk A, 10-unit, descriptor-only Admin Console permission fixture tail slice (RP21.P05.M05.S14-RP21.P05.M06.S01) and passes hardened read-only review. Verified via Read/Grep/Glob only: (1) registry.js ADMIN_CONSOLE_CP653_PACK_BINDING chains CP652->CP653->CP654 with flag admin_console_permission_fixture_tail_descriptor_verified, and ADMIN_CONSOLE_CP653_REQUIREMENTS deliverable counts (fixture:2,test:3,hermes_evidence:1,implementation:4=10) and micro-title distribution (Permission And Audit Binding:9, Synthetic Fixture Set:1) exactly match the prompt baseline and manifest plan_binding_snapshot; (2) service.js descriptor/case-set/Hermes/Claude/handoff factories follow the established CP645-CP652 pattern, freezeCp653Result forces all no-write/no-real-data flags, and runtime_boundary is fully closed with runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-654; (3) validators.js enforces coverage drift, 35 false-flags, no-leak guards, descriptor-only rows, payload exclusion, and handoff target, wired into the aggregate projection check; (4) model.test.js has four CP653 cases (coverage, descriptor-only rows, evidence/handoff, projection history); (5) admin-console-contract.json was independently confirmed genuinely regenerated (current_pack CP00-653, cp653_claude_review_packet names CP00-654 as next head, permission_fixture_tail_contract and no_write_attestation set promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false); (6) plan/queue align (live_latest CP00-653, next CP00-654/RP21.P05.M06.S02, ledger SHA consistent). Boundaries hold: manifest production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, status in_progress pending this review; no runtime opened; no real tenant/matter/document/billing data; Hermes used only for deterministic evidence labeling (runtime_receipt_emitted:false); Claude remains read-only and not final approver. Review-hardening preconditions are clean: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0), no forbidden tools, prompt within size limit, no prior invalid review attempts. The descriptor-level production_ready claim is supported by implementation, tests, local validation evidence, and no-write/no-real-data attestations; the pack makes no runtime or enterprise-trust claim, so this CP closeout goal is not blocked. Post-review disposition: downstream adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, and claude-review-result.json (all currently pending) must be finalized with this PASS receipt before the manifest is promoted to production_ready; human final approval remains required for any future enterprise-trust claim, which this pack correctly does not assert. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
